sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 49:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 49:1
items.html: Because they are GAR, for this reason, all ten Sefirot of the circles are positioned in the place of GAR of straightness (See answer 13).
